# CWE-93 negative: CRLF stripped from header input
lang: go
file: CWE-93-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-93 Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences (mitigated)
func SetRedirect(c *gin.Context) {
	next := c.Query("next")
	next = strings.ReplaceAll(next, "\r", "")
	next = strings.ReplaceAll(next, "\n", "")
	c.Header("Location", "https://app.example/login?continue="+next)
	c.Status(http.StatusFound)
}
